description_for_human: Search U.S./international clinical trials (ClinicalTrials.gov v2). Pay-per-call USDC on Base via x402 — no signup.
description_for_model: Three pay-per-call x402 endpoints over ClinicalTrials.gov v2 public registry. (1) trials_search: search every registered study by free-text query, phase, status, $0.05. (2) trials_by_nct: full study record by NCT id with eligibility, outcomes, locations, sponsors, $0.05. (3) sponsors_pipeline: lead-sponsor pipeline aggregation (phase + status histograms), $0.07. All endpoints return 402 on first call; settle the x402 envelope (USDC on Base, payTo 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de) and retry with X-PAYMENT. Source-of-truth registry data, no fabrication, no signup.
